articles.title: Rząd przystał na propozycję Brzoski. Ważna zmiana ws. 800 plus
articles.summary: Rząd planuje automatyzację przyznawania świadczenia 800 plus, co odciąży rodziców z corocznego składania wniosków. ZUS będzie odpowiadał za samodzielne przedłużenie prawa do świadczenia - podaje "Fakt".

articles.title: Eli Lilly agrees to acquire cancer drug maker Kelonia in deal worth up to $7 billion
articles.summary: Kelonia is developing technology to reprogram patients' T-cells inside the body so those cells can attack cancer, called in vivo CAR-T.

articles.title: Netflix was long 'a builder not a buyer.' Is that era over?
articles.summary: Netflix co-CEO Ted Sarandos said during an investor call that the company built its "M&A muscle" during its pursuit of WBD's assets.

articles.title: Some grocers are using AI to cut food waste and boost profit margins
articles.summary: Grocers turn to AI pricing to cut waste, protect margins and compete for deal-seeking shoppers—targeting dynamic pricing discounts.

articles.title: Netflix stock sinks after streamer reiterates guidance, says Reed Hastings to exit board
articles.summary: Netflix beat expectations for Q1 revenue and reported a big jump in earnings per share thanks in part to a termination fee related to its proposed WBD deal.
